testcase.name: beforeMethod

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1009, 37). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56) Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [4bb2807223da811ab6e780f4c6878750, clickElement {id=f.75069F9CB918024A9E324B85CBADE542.d.DADBC094C46E6273A3257EDA82DFBD38.e.1172}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\HARITHA\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65286}, goog:processID: 42964, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65286/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (4bb2807223da811ab6e780f4c6878750)] -> id: login2] Session ID: 4bb2807223da811ab6e780f4c6878750

testcase.name: loginName

failure.message: expected [User does not exist.] but found [Please fill out Username and Password.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [User does not exist.] but found [Please fill out Username and Password.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
